title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates building a Jira adapter for Archon, an AI coding workflow orchestrator. The adapter enables automated bug fixes and pull request generation triggered by Jira tickets, with dedicated conversation contexts per ticket.
